title: Consolidated Selected Advisory Activation Report — Final Decision
final_decision_rationale: All safety gates passed. Selected advisory enabled for 5 report types. 65/65 in-scope cycles enriched with advisory (0 violations). All 4 reachable in-scope taxonomy templates exercised. Monitoring mode confirmed silent. passed+completed explicitly excluded (0 surfaced). 4 orphaned taxonomy templates documented as minor gap — not blocking. Decision: keep_selected_advisory_enabled. Flag remains required. No auto-execution. No global default. Rollback immediate.
summary: EPIC #904 complete. 65 cycles enriched. 4 templates exercised. 0 violations. monitoring_mode_silent=True. excluded_safe=True. Final decision: keep_selected_advisory_enabled. No auto-execution. Flag required.

findings.finding: 65/65 in-scope cycles enriched (30 failed+partial, 10 blocked+partial, 10 hard_failure, 10 insufficient_context, 5 fallback); 0 violations
All 4 reachable in-scope taxonomy templates exercised with valid invariants
Monitoring mode confirmed silent: 0 advisory surfaced when monitoring_only=True
passed+completed explicitly excluded: 0 advisory on excluded cycles
4 taxonomy templates orphaned (no bridge combined_status key match); 4 bridge outputs use fallback (await_clarification, low confidence, valid)

recommendations.recommendation: Keep selected advisory enabled for diagnostic, mission_execution, adoption, shadow, hardening reports
recommendations.rationale: All safety gates passed. 4 templates exercised, 0 violations. Monitoring mode silent. Rollback immediate.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT expand globally — flag remains required
recommendations.rationale: Only 4 of 9 templates exercised on data in scope. Global expansion requires broader coverage evidence.

recommendations.recommendation: Create separate EPIC to align bridge combined_status keys with taxonomy names
recommendations.rationale: 4 orphaned templates + 4 unmapped bridge outputs create coverage ambiguity. Taxonomy-bridge alignment would expand effective template coverage to 8/9.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT auto-execute any advisory recommendation
recommendations.rationale: All recommendations are advisory-only. Human action always required.
